mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (email, password, name, phone, job_category , pushable) values (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{job_category}, #{pushable})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, job_category = #{jobCategory}, pushable= #{pushable}, profile_file_id = #{profileFileId} WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM user WHERE email=#{email}
